heading: Marketing education programs for small and medium size family farm operations
label: 2271 Marketing education programs for small and medium size family farm operations
text: In carrying out marketing research and education programs, the Secretary of Agriculture shall take such steps as may be necessary to increase the efforts of the Department of Agriculture in providing marketing education programs for persons engaged in small and medium size family farm operations.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 22, 1981section 1801 of Pub. L. 97–98section 4301 of this title
